title: PIL opposing TN State song played after National Anthem, Vande Mataram: Madras HC seeks Centre, State response
description: The Madras High Court has sought responses from the Union and State government to a petition challenging the alleged relegation of the Tamil Thai Vaazhthu, the officially recognised State Song of Tamil Nadu, to a position after Vande Mataram and the National Anthem during official State functions [Ananya Radhakrishnan v. Joint Secretary].A Bench of Chief Justice SA Dharmadhikari and Justice G Arul Murugan issued notice today on the plea filed by Ananya Radhakrishnan. The case is expected to be h
